name: Potato & Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel potatoes and slice thinly.
2. Sprinkle potatoes with salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Heat bacon fat in a skillet; add potatoes and cook until browned and tender, stirring frequently.
4. Spread potatoes evenly in a greased 1-quart casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle cheese over the potatoes.
6. Carefully break eggs over the cheese; cover with milk.
7. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until eggs are set.
8. Serve immediately.
